---
title: "Presentation"
author: "Jingyun Liu, Michelle Zhuang "
date: "2026-04-06"
format: revealjs
---

---
title: "Global Health Trend Explorer"
format: revealjs
---

## 🌍 Overview

- Interactive Shiny app to explore global health trends  
- Uses real-time data from the World Bank API  
- Allows users to select:
  - Country  
  - Indicator  
  - Time range  

---

## 🎯 Motivation

- Public health data is often hard to interpret  
- Users need simple tools to explore trends  
- Goal:
  - Make data **interactive**
  - Provide **clear summaries**

---

## ⚙️ Pipeline

1. Data Input (user selections)  
2. Data Retrieval (World Bank API)  
3. Data Processing (clean + filter)  
4. Analysis (summary statistics)  
5. Interpretation (rule-based explanation)

---

## 🧪 Demo

👉 Show the app:

- Select a country (e.g., China)  
- Choose indicator (Life Expectancy)  
- Adjust time range  

✔ Displays:
- Trend plot  
- Summary statistics  
- Interpretation  

---

## 💡 Design Rationale

- Used **World Bank API** → real-time, reliable data  
- Chose **Shiny** → interactive and user-friendly  
- Used **rule-based interpretation**:
  - More stable than LLMs  
  - No dependency on API keys  
  - Fully reproducible  

---

## 🗣️ Communication

- Clean UI with minimal inputs  
- Clear plot + labeled axes  
- Simple interpretation for non-technical users  

---

## ⚠️ Limitations

- Only one country at a time  
- Limited set of indicators  
- Interpretation is simple (rule-based)

---

## 🚀 Future Improvements

- Multi-country comparison  
- Correlation between indicators  
- More advanced interpretation (AI/LLM)

---

## ✅ Summary

- Built a functional data product  
- Integrated API + visualization  
- Generated interpretable insights  

👉 Helps users understand global health trends quickly

---

## Thank You
